channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-10 to 2026-07-16
item.description: 1 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt SSE, water 74°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSE). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNE, water 74°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNE). Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 2 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 10:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 11 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.0 sec). Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 12:00, 1.5 ft @ 8.1 sec, wind 7 kt W, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
1 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt SSE, water 74°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSE).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNE, water 74°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 2 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 10:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 11 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.0 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 12:00, 1.5 ft @ 8.1 sec, wind 7 kt W, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
